products.categoryDescription: Leading tile adhesive products for various tile types and applications

subProducts.description: Polymer modified Cementitious tile adhesive for mixing ceramic and vitrified tiles of size up to 2/4 ft on the floor and wall for interior applications.

Polymer modified Cementitious tile adhesive for fixing ceramic and vitrified tiles with excellent bond strength. High quality specially blended dry set adhesive for thin-bed for wall and floor external applications for all tile sizes.

Polymer modified Cementitious and extra bonding cellulose base adhesive for fixing all kind of Stone, Granite and Multipurpose on Front Tile Format. Cement based water resistant and can be used in interior and exterior conditions.

Polymer modified cement based powder tile adhesive for fixing all types of ceramic and clay tiles. Suitable for both vertical and horizontal applications. Gives excellent bond on exterior cementitious surfaces like plaster or concrete.

High-performance, polymer-enhanced cement-based tile adhesive specially formulated for floor, wall, and tile-on-tile applications. Designed for superior bonding strength, ensuring secure fixing of ceramic, vitrified, porcelain, and natural stone tiles.

Polymer modified cement based powder tile adhesive for fixing all types of ceramic tiles, clay tiles, basalt tiles, terracotta, pavers, brick, vitrified tiles, glass mosaic tiles, porcelain tiles and all natural stone tiles.
Smooth and creamy thin-set adhesive for installing small and medium format ceramic tiles, vitrified tiles & natural stones in interior areas for improved performance.

Two-component, modified Polyurethane adhesive designed for installation of ceramic tile, vitrified tile, metal tile, glass tile, agglomerates, glass mosaic tile, and natural stone on any substrate. Highly elastic, thixotropic, and suitable to lay water-sensitive tiles & stones on highly expandable, deformable, absorbent, and non-absorbent substrates.

Premium quality, polymer modified and multi-purpose thin-set adhesive for fixing glass mosaic, glass brick wall, and swimming pool tiles, marble and natural stones on variety of interior and exterior substrates for wall and floor applications.

Premium quality, polymer modified, and multi-purpose thin-set adhesive for fixing vitrified tiles, natural stones and marble, glass brick wall, swimming pool tiles on variety of interior and exterior substrates for wall and floor applications.

products.categoryDescription: Complete range of tile grout products for joint filling

subProducts.description: One component waterproof grout ideal for fitting & finishing of all types of tiles, marble and stone's joints in interior or exterior for both floors & walls, grouting of joint treatment with resistant water type joint.
Grout Admix provides one easy step to super charge your cement grout. Mix with unsanded cement grouts in place of water per grout manufacturer's use directions in indoor and outdoor applications.

White cement and polymer base grouting material which is used for joint filling in between tiles joints. When grout powder is mixed with water it will provide creamy soft paste with elastic nature. Creamy nature helps to fill joints properly as per technical requirements.

High-quality cement-based grout formulated for durable and smooth joint filling between tiles. Provides excellent adhesion, reducing cracks and ensuring long-lasting performance in both interior and exterior areas. Fine texture offers a clean, uniform finish that enhances the overall look of tiled surfaces.

Specially formulated liquid additive designed to enhance the performance of cement-based grouts. Improves flexibility, bonding strength, and water resistance for long-lasting joint durability. Reduces shrinkage and cracking, ensuring a smoother and more uniform grout finish.

products.categoryDescription: Premium epoxy-based grout for specialized applications

subProducts.description: Premium, two-component resin-based grout designed for joints that require superior strength and durability. Offers excellent resistance to stains, chemicals, and moisture, ensuring long-lasting performance. Smooth, non-porous finish prevents bacterial growth and makes cleaning effortless.

Three and two component epoxy grouting compound based on resin, hardener and colored filler. All three compounds mixed at site as per requirement and filled in joint gap of tiles. Excellent bonding, easy to clean, no water penetration.

Three and two component epoxy grouting compound based on resin, hardener and colored filler. All three compounds mixed at site as per requirement and filled in joint gap of tiles. Excellent bonding, easy to clean, no water penetration. Also available in 5kg packet.

Premium, two-component resin-based grout designed for joints that require superior strength and durability. Offers excellent resistance to stains, chemicals, and moisture, ensuring long-lasting performance. Smooth, non-porous finish prevents bacterial growth and makes cleaning effortless.
Reliable two-component epoxy grout for versatile tile applications. Offers tough waterproof joints, easy workability, and rapid curing suitable for kitchens and wet areas.

Three-component epoxy grout system engineered for high performance in the most demanding areas. Delivers exceptional mechanical and chemical resistance, ideal for commercial and heavy-duty environments.

Innovative gel base epoxy grout that offers anti-sag application on vertical surfaces, easy residue cleaning, and high resistance to moisture. Perfect for intricate tile patterns and vertical installations.

products.categoryDescription: Specialized cleaning solutions for all tile types

subProducts.description: High quality rapid active cleaner solution for use on tiles, bath tubs, wash basin etc. Rapid removal of white yellowish spot/layer along with water stains over tiles, cement stains, grime, oil, paint stains, grease, and ceramics. Removes stains and yellow spots.
Specially formulated for all types of tiles & marbles. Removes white yellowish spots/layer over tiles, cement stains, paints, grime, grease, moss and wax from concrete.

High-performance cleaning solution formulated to remove tough stains, grease, grime, and construction residues from all types of tiled surfaces. Powerful degreasing action penetrates deep into dirt and cement dust, delivering spotless, refreshed finish. Designed for both daily maintenance and heavy-duty post-work cleaning, restores natural shine of tiles.

Two-component, polymer-modified flexible cementitious waterproofing membrane specially designed for concrete and masonry surfaces. Supplied in ready-mix kits consisting of a powder component and an acrylic-modified liquid emulsion. When mixed and applied, forms a tough, seamless, and highly flexible waterproof membrane providing excellent protection against water penetration, moisture, and dampness.
Milky polymer to be mixed with grout powder to provide waterproofing property and excellent hardness and bonding.

Membrane-forming liquids—typically wax, resin, or acrylic-based—sprayed onto fresh concrete to prevent water evaporation, ensuring maximum strength, durability, and reduced surface cracking. Applied immediately after finishing when surface sheen disappears. Eliminates need for constant wetting, crucial for large horizontal surfaces like highways, bridges, and floors.

products.categoryDescription: Versatile paint solutions for interior and exterior surfaces

subProducts.description: High quality plastic emulsion paint suitable for all types of interior walls. Provides a smooth, long-lasting finish and great washability.
Premium quality enamel paint ideal for metal, wood and masonry. Provides a rich gloss finish and long-lasting protection.
Multipurpose acrylic paint for decorative and protective applications. Offers a semi-gloss finish with low odour, quick drying and decent washability.
Traditional distemper, ideal for large scale interior work. Provides a basic, economical matt finish on walls and ceilings.

products.categoryDescription: Solutions for superior waterproofing of concrete & masonry

subProducts.description: Multipurpose polymer (URP) for use as a waterproof coating, bonding agent and in modifications for waterproof mortars/concretes.
Integral liquid waterproofing compound for cement, concrete, and plaster. Minimizes water permeability and dampness in structures.
Damnproof coating provides long-lasting waterproofing for terraces and external surfaces. UV resistant and form a seamless, flexible membrane.

products.categoryDescription: Premium putty for interior and exterior wall finishing

subProducts.description: Premium wall putty for finishing and levelling plastered surfaces, creating a smooth and durable base for painting.
